summary: Comprehensive testing of GhostMail tempmail application completed. Backend APIs working at 85.7% success rate with all core CRUD operations functional. Frontend loads with excellent cyberpunk theme and all major features working except clipboard write permission issue.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 status when Resend API key not configured
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - requires admin to configure Resend API key

minor_issues.issue: Accepts invalid payloads without validation error

critical_bugs.issue: Clipboard write permission denied error creates error overlay blocking all UI interactions
critical_bugs.details: NotAllowedError: Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied. Creates webpack dev server overlay that intercepts all clicks.

passed_tests: Email generation (default, custom prefix, with expiration)
Navigation between Terminal and Config pages
Inbox page navigation and compose modal
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix clipboard write permission error by implementing proper clipboard API handling with fallback for browsers that don't allow clipboard access. The error overlay is blocking all user interactions.
